title: The Path to Sustainability Through Cloud Computing
description: This flowchart illustrates how migrating to cloud computing enables key sustainable IT practices, leading to environmental and business benefits.
relationships: Migration from On-Premises Data Centers to the Cloud enables Dynamic Resource Provisioning and leverages High-Efficiency Cloud Data Centers, which directly leads to a Reduced E-Waste and a Lower Carbon Footprint, ultimately supporting the development and operation of Sustainable Business Applications
